title: Broadcom Virtual Machine
description: A Virtual Machine represents a software-based compute instance running on a vSphere host, with configurable CPU, memory, storage, and network resources.

vm.description: The unique identifier of the virtual machine.

name.description: The display name of the virtual machine.

power_state.description: The current power state of the virtual machine.

cpu_count.description: The number of virtual CPUs allocated to the virtual machine.

memory_size_MiB.description: The memory size in mebibytes allocated to the virtual machine.

hardware.description: Hardware configuration of the virtual machine.

upgrade_policy.description: The upgrade policy for virtual hardware.

key.description: The identifier of the virtual disk.

capacity.description: The capacity of the disk in bytes.

type.description: The type of host bus adapter the disk is connected to.

disks.description: The list of virtual disks attached to the virtual machine.

key.description: The identifier of the virtual NIC.

mac_address.description: The MAC address of the NIC.

backing_type.description: The backing type for the virtual NIC.

state.description: The connection state of the NIC.

nics.description: The list of virtual network interfaces.

boot.description: Boot configuration for the virtual machine.

type.description: The firmware type used for booting.

tags.description: Tags associated with the virtual machine.
